commands.review_summary:
The branch adds per-tool throttling for exec/bash live output updates, caps live command-output payloads, adds agent handler tests, and records a changelog fix.

Reproducibility: yes. there is a high-confidence reproduction path from source plus supplied live proof: current main emits every exec update and full final aggregate, and the PR body reports a live harness with 9,297 events before the fix versus 57 after. I did not rerun the live harness during this read-only review.
